name: 1. Path prefix
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/users
identity:
  name: bob

name: 2. Path + method
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/users
identity:
  name: bob

name: 3. Exact path
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/health
identity:
  name: bob

name: 4. Capture a segment
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/alpha/issues
identity:
  name: bob

name: 5. Capture + method
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/myproj/repository/tree
identity:
  name: alice

name: 6. Capture checked against trait
rule:
app_resources:
  - paths: ["/api/v4/projects/{project}/**"]
    methods: [GET]
    where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/alpha/issues
identity:
  name: alice
  traits:
    allowed_projects: [alpha, beta]

name: 7. Glob in a non-final segment
rule:
app_resources:
  - paths: ["/api/v4/projects/*/{project}/**"]
    methods: [GET]
    where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/anyteam/alpha/issues
identity:
  name: alice
  traits:
    allowed_projects: [alpha]

name: 8. Capture equals identity
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/user/alice
identity:
  name: alice

name: 9. Role required
input:
request:
  method: DELETE
  path: /admin/settings
identity:
  name: bob
  roles: [admin]

name: 10. Carve-out (negation)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/users
identity:
  name: bob

name: 11. where holds the whole predicate
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /metrics
identity:
  name: bob

name: 12. Additive list (two rules)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /static/css/app.css
identity:
  name: bob

name: 13. Denied: wrong method
input:
request:
  method: POST
  path: /api/users
identity:
  name: bob
